knowledgePoints.en: When parallel parking on a level road next to a curb, your wheels must be within 18 inches of the curb.
knowledgePoints.zh: 在平坦道路上靠路缘平行停车时，车轮必须距离路缘18英寸以内。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 在平坦道路上靠路緣平行停車時，車輪必須距離路緣18英寸以內。

knowledgePoints.en: Always set the parking brake when parking. Leave the vehicle in gear (manual) or Park (automatic).
knowledgePoints.zh: 停车时务必拉上手刹。手动挡车辆挂入挡位，自动挡车辆挂入P挡。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 停車時務必拉上手刹。手動擋車輛掛入擋位，自動擋車輛掛入P擋。

knowledgePoints.en: Lock your vehicle when you leave it and never leave children or animals unattended in a parked vehicle.
knowledgePoints.zh: 离开车辆时锁好车门，不要将儿童或动物单独留在停放的车辆中。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 離開車輛時鎖好車門，不要將兒童或動物單獨留在停放的車輛中。

knowledgePoints.en: Look carefully for motorcycles, bicycles, and pedestrians before opening your door. Use the Dutch Reach method: open the door with the hand farthest from the door to naturally look behind you.
knowledgePoints.zh: 开车门前仔细观察是否有摩托车、自行车和行人。可以使用“荷兰式开门法“：用离车门较远的手开门，这样自然会转身向后看。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 開車門前仔細觀察是否有摩托車、自行車和行人。可以使用“荷蘭式開門法“：用離車門較遠的手開門，這樣自然會轉身向後看。

knowledgePoints.en: When parking uphill with a curb, turn your front wheels away from the curb (to the left). If the car rolls, it will roll into the curb.
knowledgePoints.zh: 上坡有路缘停车时，将前轮向远离路缘的方向（左边）转。如果车辆滑动，会滚向路缘而停下。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 上坡有路緣停車時，將前輪向遠離路緣的方向（左邊）轉。如果車輛滑動，會滾向路緣而停下。

knowledgePoints.en: When parking downhill with a curb, turn your front wheels toward the curb (to the right). If the car rolls, it will roll into the curb.
knowledgePoints.zh: 下坡有路缘停车时，将前轮向路缘方向（右边）转。如果车辆滑动，会滚向路缘而停下。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 下坡有路緣停車時，將前輪向路緣方向（右邊）轉。如果車輛滑動，會滾向路緣而停下。

knowledgePoints.en: When parking on a hill with no curb (uphill or downhill), turn your wheels to the right so the car will roll off the road if it moves.
knowledgePoints.zh: 在没有路缘的坡道上停车（无论上坡还是下坡），将前轮向右转，这样车辆滑动时会驶离道路。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 在沒有路緣的坡道上停車（無論上坡還是下坡），將前輪向右轉，這樣車輛滑動時會駛離道路。

knowledgePoints.en: Always set the parking brake when parking on a hill. For manual transmission, leave in reverse (downhill) or first gear (uphill).
knowledgePoints.zh: 在坡道停车时务必拉手刹。手动挡车辆下坡时挂倒挡，上坡时挂一挡。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 在坡道停車時務必拉手刹。手動擋車輛下坡時掛倒擋，上坡時掛一擋。

knowledgePoints.en: Never park in a marked or unmarked crosswalk, on a sidewalk, in front of a driveway, or next to a red-painted curb.
knowledgePoints.zh: 不得在标记或未标记的人行横道、人行道上、车道入口前或红色路缘旁停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 不得在標記或未標記的人行橫道、人行道上、車道入口前或紅色路緣旁停車。

knowledgePoints.en: Do not park within 15 feet of a fire hydrant or within 15 feet of a fire station driveway on the same side of the street.
knowledgePoints.zh: 不得在消防栓15英尺范围内停车，也不得在消防站车道入口同侧15英尺范围内停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 不得在消防栓15英尺範圍內停車，也不得在消防站車道入口同側15英尺範圍內停車。

knowledgePoints.en: Do not park on a freeway except in an emergency. Do not park in a disabled parking space unless you have proper disabled plates or placard.
knowledgePoints.zh: 除紧急情况外不得在高速公路上停车。没有残疾人车牌或标牌不得在残疾人停车位停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 除緊急情况外不得在高速公路上停車。沒有残疾人車牌或標牌不得在残疾人停車位停車。

knowledgePoints.en: Do not park within 7.5 feet of a railroad track or in an intersection.
knowledgePoints.zh: 不得在铁轨7.5英尺范围内或在路口停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 不得在鐵軌7.5英尺範圍內或在路口停車。

knowledgePoints.en: Do not double park (parking in the roadway next to a parked car). It is always illegal.
knowledgePoints.zh: 不得双排停车（在已停车辆旁的车道上停车）。双排停车任何时候都是违法的。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 不得雙排停車（在已停車輛旁的車道上停車）。雙排停車任何時候都是違法的。

knowledgePoints.en: Do not park where a 'No Parking' sign is posted or in a bus zone, taxi zone, or tow-away zone.
knowledgePoints.zh: 不得在有“禁止停车“标志的地方或在公交站区、出租车停靠区或拖车区停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 不得在有“禁止停車“標誌的地方或在公交站區、出租車停靠區或拖車區停車。

knowledgePoints.en: White curb: Stop only long enough to pick up or drop off passengers or mail.
knowledgePoints.zh: 白色路缘：仅允许短暂停车以上下乘客或收取邮件。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 白色路緣：僅允許短暫停車以上下乘客或收取郵件。

knowledgePoints.en: Green curb: Park for a limited time. Look for a sign or marking on the curb for the time limit.
knowledgePoints.zh: 绿色路缘：限时停车。查看路缘上的标志或标记了解限时时间。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 綠色路緣：限時停車。查看路緣上的標誌或標記了解限時時間。

knowledgePoints.en: Yellow curb: Stop only long enough to load or unload passengers or freight. The driver must stay with the vehicle.
knowledgePoints.zh: 黄色路缘：仅允许短暂停车以装卸乘客或货物。驾驶员必须留在车内。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 黄色路緣：僅允許短暫停車以裝卸乘客或貨物。駕駛員必須留在車內。

knowledgePoints.en: Red curb: No stopping, standing, or parking at any time. (Bus stops and fire lanes may be red.)
knowledgePoints.zh: 红色路缘：任何时候不得停车、站立或停放。（公交站和消防通道可能是红色。）
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 紅色路緣：任何時候不得停車、站立或停放。（公交站和消防通道可能是紅色。）

knowledgePoints.en: Blue curb: Parking is permitted only for a disabled person or driver of a disabled person with a proper placard or special license plate.
knowledgePoints.zh: 蓝色路缘：仅允许持有有效残疾人标牌或特殊车牌的残疾人或其驾驶员停车。
knowledgePoints.zhHant: 藍色路緣：僅允許持有有效残疾人標牌或特殊車牌的残疾人或其駕駛員停車。
